title: Not Just Fast
description: Not only optimization mods, but also quality of life!
body:
## In short
- A lot of optimization mods
- Some cool visual mods
- Some QOL mods
- Includes Thymine (a cool mod which fixes double-flickering bug when sneaking, also has fullbright feature and some toggles for pvp)
- Does not include a mod for FPS lock and limiter when the window is inactive. I use FPS limiter from my graphics card control panel and suggest you to use it too, it works much better and smoother.

It's just my pack for regular use. I add mods on my own but I also want to share this pack because it seems cool in general :)

The aim of this modpack is a stable vanilla game with maximum performance (with no visible quality degradation) and worthy visual or useful additions.

## Important
If you have problems with booting this modpack (usually on Windows 10), try disabling Mica mod.
